user.title: SAL Pixie
user.description: Enter your home key to connect to the mesh.

data_description.home_key: Found in the Pixie app under Home Management → Share Home (shown as "KEY")

bluetooth_confirm.title: SAL Pixie discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description: SAL Pixie mesh found. Enter your home key to connect.

data_description.home_key: Found in the Pixie app under Home Management → Share Home (shown as "KEY")

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate SAL Pixie
reauth_confirm.description: The stored home key is no longer working. Enter the current home key.

data_description.home_key: Found in the Pixie app under Home Management → Share Home (shown as "KEY")

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure SAL Pixie
reconfigure.description: Enter the new home key for the mesh.

data_description.home_key: Found in the Pixie app under Home Management → Share Home (shown as "KEY")

error.cannot_connect: No Pixie device found or connection failed

set_indicator.name: Set indicator LED
set_indicator.description: Sets the indicator LED colour and brightness on all mesh switches.

brightness.name: Brightness
brightness.description: LED brightness (0-15). Only applies to orange and purple modes.

all_on.name: Turn all switches on
all_on.description: Sends an on command to every switch in the mesh.

all_off.name: Turn all switches off
all_off.description: Sends an off command to every switch in the mesh.

mesh_unreachable.message: Could not reach the SAL Pixie mesh: {error}

confirm.title: SAL Pixie mesh unreachable
confirm.description: Home Assistant hasn't been able to reach the SAL Pixie mesh for several update cycles. Check that the Bluetooth adapter is working and at least one Pixie switch is within range, then submit to retry.
